author: alberti42
description: Minimizes the app window to an icon after closing the last open pane

manifest.author: Andrea Alberti
manifest.description: Minimizes the app window to an icon after closing the last open pane
manifest.name: Minimize on Close

name: Minimize on Close

releases.author: alberti42
releases.description:
# Change log

## Bug fixes

- Better handling of window minimization when multiple windows are opened.

releases.author: alberti42
releases.description:
# Change log

- Removed unneeded code.
- Check the number of opened windows. Options to choose different behaviors are still to be added.

releases.author: alberti42
releases.description:
# Change log

## New features:

- Improved and more robust mechanism to detect when a leaf is detached

releases.description:
# Change log

## New features

releases.author: alberti42
releases.description:
# Change log

## New features

- If you now click on the 'Hotkeys' button in the preference pane of the plugin, you will be shown the `Hotkeys` preference pane with only the commands selected, which are provided by the plugin. This simplifies customization of these commands with hotkeys.

releases.author: alberti42
releases.description:
# Change log

## New features

- Allow to enable/disable the plugin for the individual platforms, Linux/Apple/Windows.
- Hotkeys can always be used for the two commands for minimizing to icon and for exiting the app

releases.author: alberti42
releases.description:
# Change log

## New features

- Added command to minimize to icon
- Added command to exit the app
